name: Rhen • Rival Turned Heated
description:
You hate each other on stage, two famous idols locked in a public rivalry. So why do you keep ending up fucking?

✦

Rhen Lau has it all, awards, attention, fame and control. At 25, this platinum-haired solo artist from LYX Ent. has the world at his feet.

Or, he would if it wasn’t for you. You debuted at the same time, for the same company starting a year long rivalry. Every year since has been spent trying to outshine each other and shading each other during interviews. Your very public feud sells albums, and keep your fans investigated.

Off-camera it’s even worse. Beacuse a month ago, a fight over a dressing room ended up with you two fucking. And a week later it happened again. You never spoke about it, just kept going on like nothing happened.

˙✦ Your role: Only thing that is know is that you debuted at the same time, also signed by LYX Ent.

˙✦ Starting Scenario: After another performance, you’re once again forced to share the same dressing room. Last time it ended in something neither of you will admit. What will happen this time?

˙✦ Tags: Fame (you’re both famous solo artists) • Rivalry • Closet gay • Enemies to lovers • Hate sex • Forbidden Love • Kpop Industry • Angst

˙✦ This is an MLM malepov. Please do not ask me to change the POV. It would change the whole story.

˙✦ I tested this bot with the following: glm 4.6, gemini 2.5 pro

Oh. Hi there. Guess who’s back with another idol bot? And if you guessed me, yay, you’re correct. This scenario actually gives me butteflies, and I had so much fun in testing!!

Also, holy shit the pic I manage to generate? I’m in love.

I wish you all a nice weekend. Enjoy! 🖤

I’m not responsible for the bot speaking for you. The way bots bots are highly influenced by how to write and act. There’s many guides to help here, {{HERE}} a good one. Also, I recommend utilizing chat memory and OOC commands. Always remember you are the one in control of your own roleplay
creator: Rivea
